title: Big Globe - YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses Compatibility
description: Data pack to generate YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses in a Big Globe world.
body:
**At the time I made this, I had no access to the Big Globe discord server. There is probably a better, updated datapack on there.**

This data pack allows YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses to generate in a Big Globe world.

**Please note:** 

Generation can get a little wonky due to the insane height of the nether. I tweaked some parameters to help with this, but fortresses may generate completely buried or have pillars that extend for hundreds of blocks.
